text:
tmux uses "0" intentionally:

commit d4ce210713cc907fc69497c51cf9b64d2f414ca4
Author: Nicholas Marriott <nicholas.marriott@gmail.com>

    Correct the tsl/fsl sequence to ]0 not ]2 (from Marcel Korpel). While

    elsewhere.
